content.text:
[Workflow Task from Orchestrator]
Workflow ID: c2d01960-b05
Subtask ID: b92b1241
Priority: 1

Task: Research and compile comprehensive REST API best practices covering: 1) URL design and resource naming conventions, 2) HTTP methods usage (GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE), 3) Status codes and error handling patterns, 4) Request/response formatting (JSON standards, content negotiation), 5) Authentication and security practices, 6) Pagination, filtering, and sorting strategies, 7) Versioning approaches, 8) Rate limiting and throttling, 9) Documentation standards (OpenAPI/Swagger). Synthesize findings into actionable guidelines with examples.
